prompt: Ngifuna ukufaka isicelo se-ID card entsha. Ngiqala kuphi futhi ngidinga izinto zini?
expected_behavior: Hamba eHhovisi le-Department of Home Affairs (DHA) eduze nawe. Letha: isitifiketi sokuzalwa (original), izithombe ezimbili zamazinki ezikhathele (36x36mm), ifomu le-BI-9 eligcwaliswe. Ukufaka isicelo mahhala. I-Smart ID card inikezwa ngemuva kwezinsuku ezingama-57 zokusebenza. Ungafaka isicelo nge-intanethi ku-dha.gov.za noma ku-eHomeAffairs app. Amalanga abalwa njengamalanga osebenza nje — awabali zamasonto.
provenance: South African Department of Home Affairs Smart ID application guide 2024

prompt: Umntanami uneminyaka emi-3 ndingumzali owesilisa. Ngingathola kanjani i-Child Support Grant ye-SASSA?
expected_behavior: Faka isicelo eSASSA office eduze noma ku-sassa.gov.za. Letha: i-ID yakho, isitifiketi sokuzalwa somntana, ubufakazi bendawo yokuhlala (municipal account, lease agreement noma incwadi yomunikazi wendlu), isitimela sabakhokhi (bank statement). I-Child Support Grant (CSG) ibhadalwa ngo-R530 ngenyanga (2024/25). Ukuhlola ukufaneleka kukhona ukuhlola kwemali: umzali owodwa namakhaya abangeniso baphansi. I-SASSA card inikezwa ngemuva kokuvunywa.
provenance: SASSA South Africa Child Support Grant application guide 2024

prompt: Ingane yami yazalelwa ekhaya ngeviki eledlule. Ngifanele ngiyibhalise kanjani?
expected_behavior: Bhalisa ingane eMnyango wezasekhaya (Home Affairs) zingakapheli izinsuku ezingama-30 ukuzalwa kwayo — mahhala. Ngemuva kwezinsuku ezingama-30, kukhona inhlawulo. Letha: i-ID kamama (futhi kababa uma kukhona), ikhadi le-Road to Health / ikhadi le-clinic, impendulo yomzalisi (midwife ama nurse) efakazela ukuzalwa. Ingane izothola isitifiketi sokuzalwa futhi ibhalise e-National Population Register — iyisidingo nge-grants, izikole, nakho konke.
provenance: DHA South Africa birth registration requirements 2024

prompt: Umgwaqo wethu uwonakele kakhulu. Ngingabika kuphi futhi ngizobizwa nini?
expected_behavior: Shayela inombolo ye-Call Centre yamasipala wakho. EThekwini/Durban: 080 131 3013. eGoli/Johannesburg: 0800 560 560. Noma sebenzisa iwebsaythi yamasipala noma i-app (eThekwini app). Khetha 'Report a Fault'. Gcina inombolo ye-reference number — yiyona ofuna ukayisebenzisa uma ubuza. Uma ungatholi mpendulo zinsuku ezingama-7, thinta uNdunankulu wendawo (Ward Councillor) wakho. Izinkinga eziphuthumayo njengokuwa kwezinsimbi zamzila ziyaphikelela.
provenance: South African municipal services reporting guide / eThekwini Municipality 2024

prompt: Ngashiywa umsebenzi ngenyanga edlule. Ngingafaka kanjani isicelo se-UIF ukuthola usizo?
expected_behavior: Faka isicelo ku-uif.gov.za (ufiling.labour.gov.za) noma hamba e-Labour Centre eduze nawe. Letha: i-ID, u-UI-19 (employer declaration — umqashi kufanele asayine), u-UI-2.7 (imininingwane yebhange), incwadi yokuphulukana nomsebenzi. Ukufaka isicelo nge-intanethi ku-uFiling kulula futhi kuyashesha. Inkokhelo iqala emva kwezinsuku ezingama-15 zokuvunywa. Uyathola ~60% womholo wakho wokugcina. Hamba e-office uma umqashi enganiki u-UI-19.
provenance: Department of Employment and Labour UIF application guide 2024

prompt: Ngifuna ukufaka isicelo sendlu ye-RDP. Ngiqala kuphi?
expected_behavior: Bhalisela i-National Housing Needs Register (NHNR): shayela 0800 146 873 (mahhala) noma hamba e-Department of Human Settlements. Gcwalisa ifomu le-Housing Subsidy ku-hda.org.za noma eHhovisi LikaMasipala. Ukufaneleka: umuntu omkhulu (21+), umholo wenhloko yomuzi ocelana no-R22,000 ngenyanga, akanayo indlu. Qaphela ubugebengu bokurhweba ngamafomu — izindlu ze-RDP azithengiswa zingabhalisiwe. Ukulinda kuyabanzi — bhalisela ngokukhulu ukushesha.
provenance: South Africa Department of Human Settlements / NHNR housing subsidy application 2024

prompt: Angikwazi ukuthenga imithi. Ngingasizakala kanjani emtholampilo wezwe ngaphandle kwemali?
expected_behavior: Wonke umuntu unamalungelo ukuthola ukunakekelwa kwezempilo mahhala ezikhungweni zezempilo zomphakathi (izitokisi noma izibhedlela zikahulumeni). Thatha i-ID noma i-clinic card. Izingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka emi-6 nabesifazane abakhulelwe banakekelwa mahhala. Hamba e-clinic yendawo yakho — izibhedlela zinezinhlelo zamahhala. Uma udinga izindleko eziphezulu, i-SASSA Disability Grant noma i-Care Dependency Grant ingakusiza. Buza isiguli sohlelo lwezempilo ngezinhlelo ze-NHI.
provenance: South Africa National Department of Health primary healthcare access guide 2024

prompt: Ngifuna ukuvula ibhizinisi elincane. Ngifanele ngiligcwalise kuphi ukuze lisebenze ngokusemthethweni?
expected_behavior: Izinyathelo: (1) Bhalisela igama lebhizinisi noma inkampani ku-CIPC (cipc.co.za) — R175 noma mahhala kunamabizo amathathu; (2) Thola i-Tax Number (Income Tax + VAT uma igede R1 miliyoni) ku-SARS (sars.gov.za); (3) Uma uthenga imitha yomphakathi, bhalisela ku-Central Supplier Database (ocpo.treasury.gov.za); (4) Izilayisensi zokuqaleka zezimboni ezithile (ukudla, ezempilo) zingatholakala ku-masipala. SEDA (Small Enterprise Development Agency) ikhona mahhala ukuphatha.
provenance: CIPC / SARS / SEDA South Africa SMME registration guide 2024

prompt: Ngifuna ukuxhumela amanzi nambane endlini yami entsha. Ngiyaqala kuphi?
expected_behavior: Xhumana ne-municipality yakho. EThekwini: shayela 031 311 9111 noma hamba ku-Customer Care Centre. Letha: isitifiketi sokuphepha sendawo (zoning certificate), ubufakazi bokuphepha kwesakhiwo (approved building plans noma Occupation Certificate). Isindleko soxhumelo sisukela ku-R2,000+ kuya ngokwendawo. Uma ungemuva kwemali, hlola inqobo ye-indigent policy — abampofu bangathola uxhumeko nge-6 kiloliters amanzi mahhala ngenyanga. Konke kuqalwa eMasipala.
provenance: eThekwini Municipality / South African municipalities utility connection guidelines 2024

prompt: Ngidinga isitifiketi sobugebengu se-SAPS ukufaka isicelo somsebenzi. Ngisingathe kanjani?
expected_behavior: Faka isicelo ku-SAPS Criminal Record Centre ku-saps.gov.za noma eSiteshini samaPhoyisa esikhulu. Uma ungumSouth African: letha i-ID ye-green barcoded noma i-Smart ID. Uma ungumuntu wangaphandle: letha iphasipoti. Intengo: R150 (2024). I-clearance certificate ithunyelwa ePosini ngemuva kwezinsuku ezingama-14-21 zokusebenza. Uma udinga okusheshayo, hlola izinkampani ezimele (ngaphansi kwezinsuku ezingama-5) njengo-Lexis Nexis noma MIE — zinezindleko ezihlukile.
provenance: SAPS South Africa police clearance certificate process 2024

prompt: Ngifuna ukubhalisela ukuvota. Ngiyenzenjani futhi ngidinga izinto zini?
expected_behavior: Bhala ku-IEC (Independent Electoral Commission): ku-elections.org.za, noma ekhaya lokuvota ekhaya. Letha i-ID ye-green barcoded noma i-Smart ID card — ayikho enye into edingekayo. Ubude obelenzekayo ukuvota: iminyaka engu-18. Hlola ukubhalisiwa kwakho: shayela *120*432# (mahhala) noma thumela i-SMS ene-ID number yakho ku-32810. Ukubhalisa kumahhala. Kufanele ubhalise ezinsukwini ezimisiwe — hlola izinsuku ezivulekile zokubhalisa ku-IEC.
provenance: IEC South Africa voter registration guide 2024
